mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE STATUS = 'APPROVED'

SELECT PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId , TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount , ORDER_MEMO AS orderMemo , STATUS AS status , CREATED_AT AS createdAt , UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt , STORE_ID AS storeId FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE STATUS = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT RECEIPT_ID AS receiptId, RECEIPT_MEMO AS receiptMemo, RECEIVED_AT AS receivedAt, PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId FROM RECEIPTS ORDER BY RECEIPT_ID DESC
